hero.title: Manage Your Pokémon Card Collection
hero.subtitle: Track, organize, and showcase your Pokémon TCG collection with our powerful management tools.

features.subtitle: PokéCollector provides you with all the tools you need to manage your Pokémon card collection.

search.title: Card Search
search.description: Search and filter through thousands of Pokémon cards by set, type, rarity, and more.

collection.title: Collection Management
collection.description: Add cards to your collection, track quantities, and organize them however you prefer.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.description: Keep track of cards you want to acquire with our wishlist feature.

customCollections.title: Custom Collections
customCollections.description: Create and manage multiple custom collections for different sets or themes.

filtering.title: Advanced Filtering
filtering.description: Filter your collection by set, type, rarity, and more to find exactly what you're looking for.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.description: Your collection syncs across all your devices with real-time updates.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Collection?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Pokémon card collectors who are already using PokéCollector to manage their collections.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: These are our plans for you. Start with the free one and level up when you need it

currentPlanToast.title: Current plan
currentPlanToast.description: You already have this plan active.

pricing.errorUpdatingPlan: Could not update plan. Please try again.

freeplan.question: What does the free plan include?
freeplan.answer: The Apprentice plan includes all the basic features to start your collection: up to 50 cards, one collection, 10 cards in your wishlist, and basic search by name and type. It's perfect for getting started and familiarizing yourself with the platform.

changePlan.question: Can I change plans at any time?
changePlan.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or change your plan at any time. If you upgrade to a higher plan, you'll have immediate access to all the new features. If you decide to downgrade, the change will apply at the end of the current billing period.

collections.question: How does the collection system work?
collections.answer: Each collection allows you to organize your Pokémon cards however you prefer. You can create collections by set, by type, by rarity, or any other criteria. Each card can include details such as its condition, personal notes, and acquisition date.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and PayPal. All payments are securely processed through Stripe.

cancel.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription whenever you want. There are no commitments. When you cancel, you'll maintain access to premium features until the end of the billed period.

data.question: What happens to my data if I cancel my subscription?
data.answer: If you cancel a premium subscription and return to the free plan, your data will remain saved, but you'll only be able to access the limitations of the free plan. You can regain access to all your data by reactivating your subscription.

wishlist.question: How does the wishlist work?
wishlist.answer: The wishlist allows you to save cards you'd like to acquire in the future. You can add notes, set priorities, and receive notifications when we update information about those cards.

share.question: Can I share my collection with other users?
share.answer: Yes, you can share your collection with other users via a public link. You control what information is visible to other collectors and can disable visibility at any time.

database.question: How do you keep the card database updated?
database.answer: Our database is regularly updated with the latest Pokémon card releases. We work with official sources and recognized databases to ensure you have access to the most accurate and up-to-date information.

support.question: Do you offer technical support?
support.answer: Yes, we offer email technical support for all users. Premium plan users have access to priority support with guaranteed response times.
